_comment: Routing thresholds — tune these based on observed query behavior
_confidence_threshold_note: Minimum best-domain score to route at all. Below this the bot says it doesn't understand the question. Raise to reduce false routing; lower to be more permissive.
_top_k_note: Number of top prototype matches considered per routing decision. 5 is a good balance — higher values smooth noisy queries but slow down routing slightly.
_multi_domain_ratio_note: A second domain is included only if its score >= best_score * this ratio. 0.92 means the second domain must score at least 92% of the best — only triggered for genuinely dual-topic queries. Lower = more multi-domain routing; raise above 1.0 to disable multi-domain entirely.
